calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:51am and concluding at 9:56am.

Plaintiff Adrienne Dailey appeared in pro per.
Defendant John Leibbrand not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff ADREINNE DAILEY and she confirms statements made in the filings.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Adrienne Dailey, and against Defendant John Leibbrand, as follows:

Damages: $134,565.00
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $435.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $135,000.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-13-2026 Continued To Apr-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set motion for entry of default court judgment by Plaintiff.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Not reported.

Plaintiff Adrienne Dailey is present in pro per.
Defendant John Leibbrand not appearing.

ERIC HESS is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

The Court finds that a Statement of Damages has not been filed by Plaintiff.

The Court Orders the matter continued to April 17, 2026 at 9:00am in D505 to allow Plaintiff time to file and serve a Statement of Damages upon Defendant. (D505)
